name: aider
known_limitations: --yes-always does NOT auto-approve shell commands (aider issue #3903). Shell commands are silently skipped. Stdin from /dev/null provides belt-and-suspenders guard against hangs.
No structured tool call count metric; llm_turns parsed from aider's text-based LLM history log is used as a proxy
LLM interaction history is text-based (not structured JSON), requiring regex parsing to extract turn counts and token usage
DISC-01 schema field mapping: aider's llm_turns maps to the rounds.jsonl 'calls' field as an approximation, not a direct equivalent
notes: Discovery-only config. Not integrated into main competitors.json. See ARENA-HARN for permanent integration.
